width-thin.$description: Thin border. Standard borders and subtle dividers.

width-base.$description: Base border. Emphasized borders and focus rings.

width-thick.$description: Thick border. Section dividers and alert left borders.

color-default.$description: Standard border color (iron). Used for most element borders.

color-accent.$description: Accent border color (Guild Gold). Active states, hover borders.

color-muted.$description: Muted border color. Subtle structural separation.

style-ornate.$description: Ornate double-line border style for decorative elements.

style-dashed.$description: Dashed border style for draft or placeholder elements.
